UML:TaggedValue.value: Notes: Coulomb counting component not needed as this can be handled in Soc
if top of charge conditions met
if bottom of discharge conditions met
if bottom of discharge conditions met
No correction is applied Update SOC = SOC_CC
if bottom of discharge conditions met
Reset soc with bottom of discharge soc threshold
Reset soc with bottom of discharge soc threshold
if top of charge conditions met
Reset soc with top of charge soc threshold
Reset soc with top of charge soc threshold
Accumulated rest time > Required rest time

1.Compute OCV based SOC (SOC_OCV) using hysteresis-compensated voltage. 2.Apply correction using SOC_OCV, SOC_Corrected = W * SOC_OCV + (1-W) * SOC_CC Where filter weight, W= sample time/(sample time + required rest time)
Accumulated rest time > Required rest time
if top of charge conditions met

1.Calculate SOC using Coulomb Counting method SOC_CC= Initial_SOC+(((Current/Cells_parallel)*Sample time)/(3600*Capacity*SOH))
2.Accumulate rest time if the battery current is less than resting current threshold and BMS mode is in any of standby mode
Accumulated rest time > Required rest time
1.No correction is applied 2.Update SOC imported from nvm to Initial_SOC

1.Calculate SOC using Coulomb Counting method SOC_CC= Initial_SOC+(((Current/Cells_parallel)*Sample time)/(3600*Capacity*SOH))
2.Accumulate rest time if the battery current is less than resting current threshold and BMS mode is in any of standby mode
Accumulated rest time > Required rest time
1.No correction is applied 2.Update SOC imported from nvm to Initial_SOC

1.Calculate SOC using Coulomb Counting method SOC_CC= Initial_SOC+(((Current/Cells_parallel)*Sample time)/(3600*Capacity*SOH))
2.Accumulate rest time if the battery current is less than resting current threshold and BMS mode is in any of standby mode
1. Initialize SOC = SOC_OCV 2. Reset rest time = 0

1.Calculate SOC using Coulomb Counting method SOC_CC= Initial_SOC+(((Current/Cells_parallel)*Sample time)/(3600*Capacity*SOH))
2.Accumulate rest time if the battery current is less than resting current threshold and BMS mode is in any of standby mode

1.Compute OCV based SOC (SOC_OCV) using hysteresis-compensated voltage. 2.Apply correction using SOC_OCV, SOC_Corrected = W * SOC_OCV + (1-W) * SOC_CC Where filter weight, W= sample time/(sample time + required rest time)

1.Calculate SOC using Coulomb Counting method SOC_CC= Initial_SOC+(((Current/Cells_parallel)*Sample time)/(3600*Capacity*SOH))
2.Accumulate rest time if the battery current is less than resting current threshold and BMS mode is in any of standby mode

1.Calculate SOC using Coulomb Counting method SOC_CC= Initial_SOC+(((Current/Cells_parallel)*Sample time)/(3600*Capacity*SOH))
2.Accumulate rest time if the battery current is less than resting current threshold and BMS mode is in any of standby mode
No correction is applied Update SOC = SOC_CC

1.Compute OCV based SOC (SOC_OCV) using hysteresis-compensated voltage. 2.Apply correction using SOC_OCV, SOC_Corrected = W * SOC_OCV + (1-W) * SOC_CC Where filter weight, W= sample time/(sample time + required rest time)
Check NVM import status && BMS Mode
Check NVM import status && BMS Mode
Fetch the asleep time and update the accumulated rest time
Check NVM import status && BMS Mode
Compute OCV based SOC (SOC_OCV) using hysteresis-compensated voltage (V − V_hyst from hysteresis lookup).
Accumulated rest time > Required rest time

1.Compute OCV based SOC (SOC_OCV) using hysteresis-compensated voltage. 2.Apply correction using SOC_OCV, SOC_Corrected = W * SOC_OCV + (1-W) * SOC_CC Where filter weight, W= sample time/(sample time + required rest time)
Calculate required rest time Required rest time = TAU * REST TAU FACTOR
Accumulated rest time > Required rest time
Compute OCV based SOC (SOC_OCV) using hysteresis-compensated voltage (V − V_hyst from hysteresis lookup).
1. Initialize SOC = SOC_OCV 2. Reset rest time = 0
Fetch the asleep time and update the accumulated rest time
Calculate required rest time Required rest time = TAU * REST TAU FACTOR

UML:PseudoState.name: if bottom of discharge conditions met

UML:ActionState.name: Reset soc with bottom of discharge soc threshold
Reset soc with top of charge soc threshold

UML:PseudoState.name: Accumulated rest time > Required rest time

UML:ActionState.name: 1.No correction is applied 2.Update SOC imported from nvm to Initial_SOC

1.Calculate SOC using Coulomb Counting method SOC_CC= Initial_SOC+(((Current/Cells_parallel)*Sample time)/(3600*Capacity*SOH))
2.Accumulate rest time if the battery current is less than resting current threshold and BMS mode is in any of standby mode

UML:TaggedValue.value: 2. Accumulate rest time if the battery current is less than resting current threshold and BMS mode is in any of the standby modes.

UML:ActionState.name: No correction is applied Update SOC = SOC_CC

1.Compute OCV based SOC (SOC_OCV) using hysteresis-compensated voltage. 2.Apply correction using SOC_OCV, SOC_Corrected = W * SOC_OCV + (1-W) * SOC_CC Where filter weight, W= sample time/(sample time + required rest time)

UML:PseudoState.name: Check NVM import status && BMS Mode
Accumulated rest time > Required rest time

UML:ActionState.name: Compute OCV based SOC (SOC_OCV) using hysteresis-compensated voltage (V − V_hyst from hysteresis lookup).

1.Compute OCV based SOC (SOC_OCV) using hysteresis-compensated voltage. 2.Apply correction using SOC_OCV, SOC_Corrected = W * SOC_OCV + (1-W) * SOC_CC Where filter weight, W= sample time/(sample time + required rest time)
Fetch the asleep time and update the accumulated rest time
Calculate required rest time Required rest time = TAU * REST TAU FACTOR
1. Initialize SOC = SOC_OCV 2. Reset rest time = 0

UML:PseudoState.name: if top of charge conditions met

UML:TaggedValue.value: Normal_State:During runtime, the SOC is calculated using the Coulomb Counting method, Rest time accumulated if the rest conditions are met

SOC_Correction_on_Wake_State: A one-time SOC correction shall be performed before transitioning to normal operation. This ensures that if the BMS was previously shut down abruptly after a rest period without performing a valid correction, the system will verify the accumulated rest time upon wake-up. If the rest time exceeds the required threshold, an OCV-based correction shall be applied to update the Coulomb Counting SoC (SoC_CC) accordingly.
SOC_Reset_State:Resetting SOC with OCV based SOC if the NVM import is failed.
If the accumulated rest time exceeds the required threshold, an OCV-based SOC correction is applied.
